posts.text: “Good morning. It’s Thursday. Stay focused on the mission. Or nap. Napping is also good. Also, I love you.”

I feel so sorry for these people.  Not the only emotion to be sure. But I just think they’re such sad cases.


Joseph Peeler (@JosephPeel7680)

Are your dogs Israel First, too?



— https://nitter.net/JosephPeel7680/status/2034259557531468183#m

Tucker rn

  



Faytuks Network (@FaytuksNetwork)

BREAKING: Qatar’s Ministry of Foreign Affairs has declared Iran’s Military Attaché, Security Attaché, and all attaché office staff persona non grata, ordering them to leave the country within 24 hours.



— https://nitter.net/FaytuksNetwork/status/2034365442358116502#m
The Iran war divides a lot of my friends. I figured it’d be useful, at least for me, to just walk through how I think about it. thedispatch.com/newsletter/g…
“Good morning. It’s Friday. Don’t be frightened by my collar. It’s for scaring away mean dogs. At least that’s what they told me. Also, I love you.”
I forgot I’ve had an account here since 2023. Kicking the tires now.
Giving this a whirl. This is my first Bluesky post and, yes, I'm tweeting pictures of my dogs. Don't say you weren't warned.
